name: buildbuddy
description: Troubleshoot BuildBuddy invocations, compare cache behavior, reproduce remote actions, inspect flaky tests, diagnose log snippets, analyze usage, and research BuildBuddy+Bazel source behavior.

interface.shortDescription: Debug BuildBuddy invocations, logs, flakes, usage, and source behavior
interface.longDescription: Use BuildBuddy to troubleshoot invocations, compare cache and action behavior, reproduce remote actions with bb execute, inspect recent flaky tests, diagnose BuildBuddy or bb CLI log snippets, analyze billing or usage trends, and research BuildBuddy+Bazel behavior across Bazel, BuildBuddy, toolchain, and Helm chart source while protecting API keys.
defaultPrompt: Analyze BuildBuddy usage for this group
Fetch recent flaky tests from BuildBuddy
Use ask-buddy to investigate this BuildBuddy+Bazel issue from source
